parents.subject: LU-19295 utils: handle insufficient arguments to lst

commit.subject: LU-10026 sec: PTLRPC_MAX_BRW_BITS is maximum pool size
commit.message:
LU-10026 sec: PTLRPC_MAX_BRW_BITS is maximum pool size

CSDC doesn't require double buffer size now, so
maximum pull size can be PTLRPC_MAX_BRW_BITS.
